title: Nanilas
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Nanilas''' was the most widespread of the several [[Rellarin]] root [[Language/Legends|languages]]. The eight languages of the [[Riha Archipelago]] were derived from Nanilas, though it is not clear if it was spoken on its own as a living language.

As there were at least 57 Rellarin cultural groups, and each had their own language, most Rellarin were multilingual, speaking their own languages and those of neighboring tribes.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
